---
title: 'dapR2 (week 12 Lect1): Activity1'
author: "Alex Doumas"
date: "14/09/2020"
output: html_document
---

# Question 1

When using a linear model to analyse an experiment with an IV with 5 levels, you would need n dummy variables, where n is?

a. 2
b. 3
c. 4 
d. 5


# Question 2

When you are using dummy codes to compare levels of an IV, the group you choose as the reference doesn't mean anything. 

TRUE or FALSE?






# Answers
1. c
2. False -- the group you choose as the reference is the once all other groups are compared to.
